    59	@router.post("/generate/{referral_type}", response_model=ReferralCodeResponse)
    60	async def generate_referral_code(
    61	    referral_type: ReferralType,
    62	    current_user = Depends(get_current_user)
    63	):
    64	    """Generate a unique referral code for the current user"""
    65	    
    66	    # Check if user already has a code for this type
    67	    existing = await db.get_referral_code_by_user(current_user.id, referral_type)

    70	    else:
    71	        # Create new code
    72	        prefix = "IH-V" if referral_type == ReferralType.VENDOR else "IH-C"
    73	        new_code = await db.create_referral_code(current_user.id, referral_type, prefix)
    74	        code = new_code.code
    75	    
    76	    # Generate share link
    77	    base_url = "https://ihhashi.co.za"
    78	    if referral_type == ReferralType.VENDOR:
    79	        share_link = f"{base_url}/vendor/signup?ref={code}"
    80	        message = "Share this link with vendors. You get 2 FREE DAYS for each vendor who signs up!"
    81	    else:
    82	        share_link = f"{base_url}/signup?ref={code}"
    83	        message = "Share this link with friends. You BOTH earn Hashi Coins!"
    84	    
    85	    return ReferralCodeResponse(

    93	@router.post("/apply", status_code=200)
    94	async def apply_referral_code(
    95	    request: ApplyReferralRequest,
    96	    current_user = Depends(get_current_user)
    97	):
    98	    """Apply a referral code during signup - awards bonuses to both parties"""
    99	    
   100	    # Check eligibility

   103	        raise HTTPException(

   111	    if not code.startswith(expected_prefix):
   112	        raise HTTPException(
   113	            status_code=400, 
   114	            detail=f"This code is for {'vendors' if request.referral_type == ReferralType.CUSTOMER else 'customers'}"
   115	        )
   116

   135	        
   136	        # Complete the referral
   137	        await db.complete_referral(referral.id, {
   138	            "bonus_days": rewards.vendor_bonus_days_per_referral
   139	        })
   140	        
   141	        return {
   142	            "message": "Referral code applied successfully!",
   143	            "referrer_reward": f"{rewards.vendor_bonus_days_per_referral} days added to free trial",
   144	            "your_welcome_bonus": "Welcome to iHhashi! Your referrer helped you get started.",
   145	            "referral_code": code
   146	        }
   147	    else:
   148	        # For customer referrals, coins are awarded when referee completes first order
   149	        # But give welcome bonus immediately
   150	        await db.add_coins_to_customer(
   151	            current_user.id,
   152	            rewards.customer_referee_coins,
   153	            "Welcome bonus for using referral code",
   154	            "welcome_bonus"
   155	        )
   156	        
   157	        return {
   158	            "message": "Referral code applied successfully!",
   159	            "referrer_reward": f"{rewards.customer_referrer_coins} Hashi Coins (after your first order)",
   160	            "your_welcome_bonus": f"{rewards.customer_referee_coins} Hashi Coins added to your account!",
   161	            "referral_code": code,
   162	            "hashi_coins": rewards.customer_referee_coins
   163	        }

   204	@router.post("/redeem/free-delivery")
   205	async def redeem_free_delivery(current_user = Depends(get_current_user)):
   206	    """Redeem Hashi Coins for a free delivery"""
   207	    rewards = ReferralReward(referral_type=ReferralType.CUSTOMER)

   232	        }

    62	@router.post("/generate/{referral_type}", response_model=ReferralCodeResponse)
    63	async def generate_referral_code(
    64	    referral_type: ReferralType,
    65	    current_user = Depends(get_current_user)
    66	):
    67	    """Generate a unique referral code for the current user"""
    68	    
    69	    # Check if user already has a code for this type
    70	    existing = await get_referral_code_by_user(current_user.id, referral_type)
    71	    if existing:
    72	        code = existing.code
    73	    else:
    74	        # Create new code
    75	        prefix = "IH-V" if referral_type == ReferralType.VENDOR else "IH-C"
    76	        new_code = await create_referral_code(current_user.id, referral_type, prefix)
    77	        code = new_code.code
    78	    
    79	    # Generate share link
    80	    base_url = "https://ihhashi.co.za"
    81	    if referral_type == ReferralType.VENDOR:
    82	        share_link = f"{base_url}/vendor/signup?ref={code}"
    83	        message = "Share this link with vendors. You get 2 FREE DAYS for each vendor who signs up!"
    84	    else:
    85	        share_link = f"{base_url}/signup?ref={code}"
    86	        message = "Share this link with friends. You BOTH earn Hashi Coins!"
    87	    
    88	    return ReferralCodeResponse(
    89	        code=code,
    90	        referral_type=referral_type.value,
    91	        share_link=share_link,
    92	        message=message
    93	    )

    96	@router.post("/apply", status_code=200)
    97	async def apply_referral_code(
    98	    request: ApplyReferralRequest,
    99	    current_user = Depends(get_current_user)
   100	):
   101	    """Apply a referral code during signup - awards bonuses to both parties"""
   102	    
   103	    # Check eligibility
   104	    eligible = await check_referral_eligibility(current_user.id, request.referral_code)
   105	    if not eligible:
   106	        raise HTTPException(
   107	            status_code=400, 
   108	            detail="Invalid referral code or you have already used a referral code"
   109	        )
   110	    
   111	    # Validate code format
   112	    code = request.referral_code.upper()
   113	    expected_prefix = "IH-V" if request.referral_type == ReferralType.VENDOR else "IH-C"
   114	    if not code.startswith(expected_prefix):
   115	        raise HTTPException(
   116	            status_code=400, 
   117	            detail=f"This code is for {'vendors' if request.referral_type == ReferralType.CUSTOMER else 'customers'}"
   118	        )
   119	    
   120	    # Get the referral code record
   121	    code_record = await get_referral_code_by_code(code)
   122	    if not code_record:
   123	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Referral code not found")
   124	    
   125	    # Create referral record
   126	    referral = await create_referral(
   127	        referrer_id=code_record.user_id,
   128	        referee_id=current_user.id,
   129	        referral_code=code,
   130	        referral_type=request.referral_type
   131	    )
   132	    
   133	    rewards = ReferralReward(referral_type=request.referral_type)
   134	    
   135	    if request.referral_type == ReferralType.VENDOR:
   136	        # For vendor referrals, extend trial immediately
   137	        await extend_vendor_trial(code_record.user_id, rewards.vendor_bonus_days_per_referral)
   138	        
   139	        # Complete the referral
   140	        await complete_referral(referral.id, {
   141	            "bonus_days": rewards.vendor_bonus_days_per_referral
   142	        })
   143	        
   144	        return {
   145	            "message": "Referral code applied successfully!",
   146	            "referrer_reward": f"{rewards.vendor_bonus_days_per_referral} days added to free trial",
   147	            "your_welcome_bonus": "Welcome to iHhashi! Your referrer helped you get started.",
   148	            "referral_code": code
   149	        }
   150	    else:
   151	        # For customer referrals, coins are awarded when referee completes first order
   152	        # But give welcome bonus immediately
   153	        await add_coins_to_customer(
   154	            current_user.id,
   155	            rewards.customer_referee_coins,
   156	            "Welcome bonus for using referral code",
   157	            "welcome_bonus"
   158	        )
   159	        
   160	        return {
   161	            "message": "Referral code applied successfully!",
   162	            "referrer_reward": f"{rewards.customer_referrer_coins} Hashi Coins (after your first order)",
   163	            "your_welcome_bonus": f"{rewards.customer_referee_coins} Hashi Coins added to your account!",
   164	            "referral_code": code,
   165	            "hashi_coins": rewards.customer_referee_coins
   166	        }
   167

   207	@router.post("/redeem/free-delivery")
   208	async def redeem_free_delivery(current_user = Depends(get_current_user)):
   209	    """Redeem Hashi Coins for a free delivery"""
   210	    rewards = ReferralReward(referral_type=ReferralType.CUSTOMER)
   211	    
   212	    # Check balance
   213	    account = await get_customer_reward_account(current_user.id)
   214	    if not account:
   215	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Reward account not found")
   216	    
   217	    if account.hashi_coins_balance < rewards.coins_for_free_delivery:
   218	        return {
   219	            "success": False,
   220	            "message": f"You need {rewards.coins_for_free_delivery} Hashi Coins for free delivery",
   221	            "coins_required": rewards.coins_for_free_delivery,
   222	            "current_balance": account.hashi_coins_balance
   223	        }
   224	    
   225	    # Process redemption
   226	    redemption = await redeem_coins_for_reward(current_user.id, "free_delivery")
   227	    
   228	    if redemption:
   229	        return {
   230	            "success": True,
   231	            "message": "Free delivery redeemed successfully!",
   232	            "coins_spent": rewards.coins_for_free_delivery,
   233	            "new_balance": account.hashi_coins_balance - rewards.coins_for_free_delivery,
   234	            "expires_at": redemption.expires_at.isoformat() if redemption.expires_at else None
   235	        }
   236	    
   237	    raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Failed to redeem coins")
   238	
   239	
   240	@router.post("/redeem/discount/{amount}")
   241	async def redeem_discount(
   242	    amount: int,  # 15 or 30
   243	    current_user = Depends(get_current_user)
   244	):
   245	    """Redeem Hashi Coins for a discount coupon"""
   246	    
   247	    if amount not in [15, 30]:
   248	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Discount amount must be 15 or 30")
   249	    
   250	    rewards = ReferralReward(referral_type=ReferralType.CUSTOMER)
   251	    
   252	    redemption_type = "discount_15" if amount == 15 else "discount_30"
   253	    coins_required = rewards.coins_for_discount_10 if amount == 15 else rewards.coins_for_discount_25
   254	    
   255	    # Check balance
   256	    account = await get_customer_reward_account(current_user.id)
   257	    if not account:
   258	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Reward account not found")
   259	    
   260	    if account.hashi_coins_balance < coins_required:
   261	        return {
   262	            "success": False,
   263	            "message": f"You need {coins_required} Hashi Coins for R{amount} discount",
   264	            "coins_required": coins_required,
   265	            "current_balance": account.hashi_coins_balance
   266	        }
   267	    
   268	    # Process redemption
   269	    redemption = await redeem_coins_for_reward(current_user.id, redemption_type)
   270	    
   271	    if redemption:
   272	        return {
   273	            "success": True,
   274	            "message": f"R{amount} discount redeemed successfully!",
   275	            "coins_spent": coins_required,
   276	            "discount_value": amount,
   277	            "new_balance": account.hashi_coins_balance - coins_required,
   278	            "expires_at": redemption.expires_at.isoformat() if redemption.expires_at else None
   279	        }
   280	    
   281	    raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Failed to redeem coins")
